description: Pilot — burning bush; Moses lowercase, Yahweh subject caps
mustContain: Now Moses was keeping the flock of Jethro, his father-in-law, the priest of Midian, and he led the flock
Yahweh’s angel appeared to him in a flame of fire out of the middle of a bush. he looked, and behold, the bush burned with fire
mustNotContain: and He led the flock to the back of the wilderness
Yahweh’s angel appeared to Him in a flame
Yahweh was with Moses, and He was
